best_individual: add(distance, mul(protected_div(steepness, distance), if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(protected_div(steepness, distance), steepness), 0.045)))

hall_of_fame.individual: add(distance, mul(protected_div(steepness, distance), if_then_else(is_water, protected_div(protected_div(steepness, distance), steepness), 0.045)))
add(distance, mul(protected_div(if_then_else(is_water, 0.143, steepness), distance), if_then_else(is_water, add(steepness, 0.172), 0.045)))
add(distance, mul(protected_div(if_then_else(is_water, 0.075, steepness), distance), if_then_else(is_water, distance, 0.045)))
